summary: Complete testing of Core Engine module. Backend: 30/30 tests PASSED (auth protection, NormaConfig CRUD, Componenti CRUD, seed operations, configure, calculate, validate). Frontend: All UI components verified - 3 tabs, product configurator with 10 types, calculation with Uw display, zone compliance grid (6 zones), suggestions, Norme tab with seed data, Componenti tab with 3 tables (Vetri/Telai/Distanziatori).

backend_auth.all_endpoints_require_auth: PASS - All engine endpoints return 401 without session cookie

backend_norme_crud.GET /api/engine/norme: PASS - Returns list of norms (active_only filter works)
backend_norme_crud.DELETE /api/engine/norme/{norma_id}: PASS - Deletes norm, returns 404 on re-fetch

backend_componenti_crud.GET /api/engine/componenti: PASS - Returns list with tipo filter (vetro, telaio, distanziatore)
backend_componenti_crud.POST /api/engine/componenti: PASS - Creates new component with comp_id
backend_componenti_crud.POST /api/engine/componenti/seed: PASS - Seeds 8 vetri, 8 telai, 5 distanziatori (21 total)

backend_calculate.zone_compliance_grid: PASS - Returns compliance for all 6 zones (A-F)

backend_validate.block_ce_marking_rule: PASS - product_height > 4000 blocks CE marking for EN_13241

backend_suggestions.upgrade_glass_suggestion: PASS - Generated when Uw exceeds zone limit and Ug > 1.5

frontend_page.title: PASS - 'Core Engine' with CPU icon
frontend_page.subtitle: PASS - 'Motore normativo universale — Configurazione, calcolo e validazione'

frontend_configurator.product_types: PASS - 10 product type buttons (cancello, portone, finestra, etc.)
frontend_configurator.norme_applicabili: PASS - Shows applicable norms with performances badges
frontend_configurator.dimension_inputs: PASS - Height, width, frame width inputs with data-testid
frontend_configurator.component_selectors: PASS - Vetro, telaio, distanziatore, zona selectors
frontend_configurator.results_display: PASS - Shows Uw value, zone compliance grid (6 zones), warnings, suggestions
frontend_configurator.compliance_indicators: PASS - Green checkmark/red X per zone

frontend_norme_tab.norm_cards: PASS - Shows EN 1090-1, EN 13241, EN 14351-1 with product types and performances

frontend_component_dialog.opens: PASS - Click new button opens dialog
frontend_component_dialog.fields: PASS - codice, label, tipo, thermal values, produttore

frontend_sidebar.nav_item: PASS - 'Core Engine' nav item with Shield icon

critical_code_review_comments: Core Engine module fully implemented and working
Uw calculation formula correctly implements ISO 10077-1
Zone limits updated to Draft 2025/2026 restrictive limits
Validation rules engine properly evaluates conditions and fires BLOCK_CE_MARKING/WARN actions
Suggestions generated dynamically based on component performance vs zone limits
Data-driven architecture: adding new norm = adding new JSON config, zero code changes
seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 norms (EN_1090_1, EN_13241, UNI_EN_14351_1) and 21 components (8 vetri, 8 telai, 5 distanziatori) during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Core Engine module fully tested: Backend CRUD for norme and componenti, seed operations, configure/calculate/validate endpoints. Frontend CoreEnginePage with 3 tabs working. Uw formula verified: Uw = (Ag*Ug + Af*Uf + lg*Psi) / (Ag+Af). Zone limits: A=2.6, B=2.6, C=1.75, D=1.67, E=1.3, F=1.0. BLOCK_CE_MARKING fires when product_height > 4000 for EN_13241. All data-testids in place.
